open

~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21980/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Call of Juarez - Bound in Blood/Out/Settings/Video.scr

change :

Resolution(1024,768) in Resolution(1920,1080) or other resolution that matches with your screen

after black screen press enter, press enter again you will hear sound (music) , press windows key to see all open windows, you will see the menu. after that the game runs fine.
title: Call of Juarez®: Bound in Blood

notes: Game detects resolution wrong, workaround set  "-windowed" mode as Steam launch option, start the game (it defaults to a low resolution) and then you can select whatever resolution you want. Intro and cut-scene videos are black, but can be skipped by just pressing enter. In-game graphics were heavily glitched to the point of being unplayable, missing textures etc.. Tried different Proton launch options but made no difference. Also tried Proton 3.7-8 to make sure this is not a regression and got same results. Even if the previous guys reports did not experience issues with the graphics in-game, this would still be Silver at best because of missing videos.
title: Call of Juarez®: Bound in Blood

notes: Manual edit to set resolution as described here ".steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21980/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My\ Documents/Call\ of\ Juarez\ -\ Bound\ in\ Blood/Out/Settings/Video.scr" then game runs perfectly well with all settings on max. Very smooth at 3840x1600.
title: Call of Juarez®: Bound in Blood

notes: Tried different tweaks, but without any success. Game is starting but is lacking textures completely, therefore unplayable for me.
title: Call of Juarez®: Bound in Blood

notes: As mentioned by others before, the game is starting up with a black screen. Just hit ESC after a while an the main menu shows up. On my system there went something wrong with scaling in full screen mode. Main menu and character selection in game not working correctly. I have to use windowed mode. But setting the desktop resolution to same of the window resolution, it looked like full screen mode. From now on, the whole game was running without any further issues.
title: Call of Juarez: Bound in Blood

notes: black screen on launch, just hit ESC after a couple seconds. I'm playing with D9VK, great performance, no issues so far
title: Call of Juarez: Bound in Blood

notes: As previous report says press ESC after a few seconds at the start to get pass the black screen and it runs fine with D9VK. Minor tweaks, but rating is Gold since it's not quite working out of the box.
title: Call of Juarez: Bound in Blood
